raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table edge; there is enough lateral clearance to apply gentle inward pressure without shifting the stacked boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained and stabilized on the tabletop, reducing the risk of slipping while box_1 is being separated and lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the right arm continues stabilizing box_2; sufficient vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without contacting the table or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides while box_2 remains stabilized on the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already firmly secured laterally by both arms; the attachment/friction interface between box_1 and box_2 can be overcome by a controlled upward pull; box_2 remains stabilized to prevent it from lifting with box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted free from box_2 (detached/separated) and is held above the tabletop under full control of both arms."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side of box_2 without colliding with box_1 or the table edge; there is enough lateral clearance to apply gentle inward pressure without shifting the stacked boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained and stabilized on the tabletop, reducing the risk of slipping while box_1 is being separated and lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1; the right arm continues stabilizing box_2; sufficient vertical clearance exists above box_1 to lift without contacting the table or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors from the sides while box_2 remains stabilized on the table.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already firmly secured laterally by both arms; the attachment/friction interface between box_1 and box_2 can be overcome by a controlled upward pull; box_2 remains stabilized to prevent it from lifting with box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted free from box_2 (detached/separated) and is held above the tabletop under full control of both arms.
